stories.headline: Trump says ceasefire is 'over' after US and Iran trade strikes
stories.summary: Speaking ahead of a Nato summit, the president says US negotiators can keep talking with the Iranians "if they want".

stories.headline: Stocks Drop, Oil Jumps After Trump Says Ceasefire with Iran Is "Over" | Bloomberg Brief 07/08/2026
stories.summary: US equity futures slump and oil extends gains as President Trump says a tentative ceasefire with Iran is over. The US had struck 80 sites in Iran ahead of the president's remarks at the NATO Summit in Ankara, Turkey. Mark McCormick of BMO Capital Markets discusses the impact of fresh geopolitical tensions.  (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Trump says ceasefire ‘over’ after US, Iran trade attacks
stories.summary: Trump made the announcement at a NATO summit after Iran attacked bases hosting US forces in Kuwait and Bahrain.

stories.headline: Oil spikes and European stock markets slide as Trump says Iran ceasefire over
stories.summary: Crude oil prices rose more than 6% to a two-week high after US President Donald Trump declared the interim accord to end the war with Iran "over", while fresh US military strikes renewed concerns about oil supplies through the Strait of Hormuz.

stories.headline: Top Democrats press Maine Senate candidate to drop out of race over sexual assault allegation

stories.headline: Trump Says US-Iran Ceasefire Is ‘Over’ After Strikes | The Pulse 7/8/2026
stories.summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests: Mike Bell, RBC BlueBay Market Strategy Head; Ionela Ciolan, Wilfried Martens Centre for European Studies Research Officer  (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: U.S. and Iran launch fresh strikes following attacks on commercial ships
stories.summary: Iran said it had targeted more than 80 U.S. military facilities in Bahrain and Kuwait, after the U.S. launched strikes in response to attacks on commercial ships in the Strait of Hormuz.

stories.headline: Indian Stocks, Rupee Slide After Trump Reignites Iran Tensions

stories.headline: Denmark says it will defend Greenland as Trump threatens to revive NATO crisis

stories.summary: Argentina is set to make a major payment on its dollar bonds this week, pulling off a feat few investors thought possible while the country refuses to tap global debt markets.

stories.headline: Premier League clubs' pre-tax losses surged more than 600% in a single season
stories.summary: English top-flight football clubs saw their combined pre-tax losses balloon from £135 million (€158mn) to £948 million (€1.1bn) in the 2024/25 season, even as their revenues climbed to a record high.

stories.headline: Spanish strawberries among Europe's cleanest, study finds low pesticide levels
stories.summary: A study by PAN Europe and Ecologistas en Acción has found residues on 88% of strawberries tested in Europe, compared with a far lower rate in Spanish samples.
